mapper.select: /* SQL ID : QbnkCtgrDAO.profQbnkSbjctSelect 설 명 : 교수문제은행과목조회 */ SELECT SBJCT.SBJCT_ID , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , SBJCT.PROF_ID , SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID , SBJCT.CRS_MSTR_ID , USR.USER_RPRS_ID , USR.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON SBJCT.PROF_ID = USR.USER_ID WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT.DELYN = 'N'
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : QbnkCtgrDAO.qbnkCtgrRegist 설 명 : 문제은행분류등록 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR CTGR USING ( SELECT #{qbnkCtgrId} AS QBNK_CTGR_ID , #{upQbnkCtgrId} AS UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID , #{crsMstrId} AS CRS_MSTR_ID , #{smstrChrtId} AS SMSTR_CHRT_ID , #{sbjctId} AS SBJCT_ID , #{userRprsId} AS USER_RPRS_ID , #{userId} AS USER_ID , #{ctgrnm} AS CTGRNM , #{ctgrExpln} AS CTGR_EXPLN , #{ctgrSeqno} AS CTGR_SEQNO , 'Y' AS SHRNYN , 'N' AS DELYN , #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID FROM DUAL ) QBNK ON ( CTGR.QBNK_CTGR_ID = QBNK.QBNK_CTGR_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CTGR.CTGRNM = QBNK.CTGRNM , CTGR.CTGR_EXPLN = QBNK.CTGR_EXPLN , CTGR.CTGR_SEQNO = QBNK.CTGR_SEQNO , CTGR.MDFR_ID = QBNK.RGTR_ID , CTGR.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( QBNK_CTGR_ID , UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID , CRS_MSTR_ID , SMSTR_CHRT_ID , SBJCT_ID , USER_RPRS_ID , USER_ID , CTGRNM , CTGR_EXPLN , CTGR_SEQNO , SHRNYN , DELYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( QBNK.QBNK_CTGR_ID , QBNK.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID , QBNK.CRS_MSTR_ID , QBNK.SMSTR_CHRT_ID , QBNK.SBJCT_ID , QBNK.USER_RPRS_ID , QBNK.USER_ID , QBNK.CTGRNM , QBNK.CTGR_EXPLN , QBNK.CTGR_SEQNO , QBNK.SHRNYN , QBNK.DELYN , QBNK.RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : QbnkCtgrDAO.qbnkCtgrSelect 설 명 : 문제은행분류조회 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND QBNK_CTGR_ID = #{qbnkCtgrId}

/* SQL ID : QbnkCtgrDAO.qbnkCtgrUseCntSelect 설 명 : 문제은행분류사용수조회 */ SELECT (SELECT COUNT(QBNK_CTGR_ID) FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID = #{qbnkCtgrId}) AS CTGR_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(QBNK_QSTN_ID) FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_QSTN WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND QBNK_CTGR_ID = #{qbnkCtgrId}) AS QSTN_CNT FROM DUAL
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : QbnkCtgrDAO.qbnkCtgrSeqnoModify 설 명 : 문제은행분류순번수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR CTGR SET CTGR.CTGR_SEQNO = CTGR.CTGR_SEQNO - 1 , CTGR.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , CTGR.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE CTGR.DELYN = 'N' AND CTGR.QBNK_CTGR_ID <> #{qbnkCtgrId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR BASE WHERE BASE.QBNK_CTGR_ID = #{qbnkCtgrId} AND BASE.DELYN = 'N' AND CTGR.CTGR_SEQNO > BASE.CTGR_SEQNO AND ( (BASE.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID IS NULL AND CTGR.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID IS NULL) OR (CTGR.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID = BASE.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID) ) )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : QbnkCtgrDAO.qbnkSearchSbjctList 설 명 : 문제은행검색과목목록 */ SELECT SBJCT.SBJCT_ID , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SBJCT_ADM ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ID AND SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF' AND SBJCT_ADM.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT.DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : QbnkCtgrDAO.qbnkSearchProfList 설 명 : 문제은행검색교수목록 */ SELECT DISTINCT USR.USER_RPRS_ID , USR.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM ADM JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON USR.USER_ID = ADM.USER_ID WHERE SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF'
